final:
module adc_24_to_12 (  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire enable,  
    input wire [23:0] analog_input,  
    output reg [11:0] digital_output  
);  

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
        if (enable) begin  
            digital_output <= analog_input / 4096;  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
